body.title: Add SUBSYSTEMS.md index to cognition/ mapping 90+ files to named subsystems
body.result: SUBSYSTEMS.md: 102 files mapped to 6 subsystems; 3-test completeness enforcer
body.description:
90+ files in wild_igor/igor/cognition/ with no subsystem map makes blast-radius assessment impossible. Add cognition/SUBSYSTEMS.md mapping every file to one of 4-6 named subsystems (narrative, dreaming, twm, salience, gating, calibration), plus a one-line test that fails if a new file is added without an entry.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/SUBSYSTEMS.md (new), tests/test_cognition_subsystem_index.py (new)
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code; index maintained alongside file additions
**Scope boundary:** in scope: SUBSYSTEMS.md with all current cognition/ files mapped; test asserting set(cognition/*.py) == set(keys in SUBSYSTEMS.md). Out of scope: moving files, creating subdirectories, changing imports — index first, restructure under a separate ticket.
**Test plan:** test_cognition_subsystem_index.py asserts every .py in cognition/ appears in the index; fails if a new file is added without an entry.
